title: Usability improvements for Overview Popup from clicking a project on Gantt
excerpt: When you click on the Gantt, the overview pop-up has usability issues: 1) We Cannot expand screen, one would expect to be able to expand 2) The project info left side bar is a distractor 3) Should bring up project board …

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: When you click on the Gantt, the overview pop-up has usability issues: 1) We Cannot expand screen, one would expect to be able to expand 2) The project info left side bar is a distractor 3) Should bring up project board and then they can go to overview. Can you add in setting what view it opens when clicking the project on the Gantt, otherwise just make it so it opens the project board.

posts.author: MichaelTomar (Michael Tomar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Totally agree, the overview popup feels cramped, and not being able to expand it makes working with bigger projects a pain. I’ve also found that sidebar distracting, especially when I just want a quick glance or need to focus on details.
I’d love it if there were a setting to control what opens from the Gantt, either the full board or a customizable view. Right now, my workaround is to just click through to the project board manually, but it’s an extra step and not as smooth as it could be.
